{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/nautilus/multi-tier-architecture/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. multi-tier-architecture

_Файлов:_ 2

h2. Содержание

* [00-question-multi-tier.md|00-question-multi-tier.md] — 
* [01-strategic-significance.md|01-strategic-significance.md] — > [!WARNING]

* [README|docs/nautilus/community-discussions/habr-article-1-reaction/README.md] (сходство 0.31)
